flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Hillsborough Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Hillsborough Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (19.2k → 21.5k).
